validation.details: English and Chinese each contain 68 F-number references, with 35 unique equation numbers.

unresolved_issues: Unsymmetrized Rotemberg price-setting FOC should be checked against the PDF.
Paper-side bond/tax variables are aggregated out of the MMB implementation.
Implementation naming maps the paper discount factor beta to parameter delta.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
